item.name: Deep Plaice
item.description:
The name provides a useful hint as to the areas of the ocean this creature usually inhabits.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Normally found inhabiting relatively shallow seafloors, this species is said to be seen in waters as deep as 200 yalms. Researchers speculate a proliferation of these fish in recent years has forced them to seek deeper waters where they can more freely feed.
